title: dalbergia minutiflora
intro: Dalbergia minutiflora, also known as the minute-flowered dalbergia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Dalbergia minutiflora are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
